chosen_action.title: Refresh shared latest board/lane truth after repo conversion proof asset

why_this_action.summary: The new repo conversion proof asset had shipped, but the shared latest board/lane surfaces were still stale and could steer the next active-loop pass from outdated hold-window truth. The strongest same-run move was to reuse the existing execution-board runner to resync those canonical artifacts instead of fabricating another packet.
supporting_reasons: marketing_2026-05-27_121621_repo_conversion_proof_asset.json logged a real conversion-path asset at 2026-05-27T12:16:21+02:00.

agents/marketing/logs/distribution_lane_latest.json was still pinned to distribution_architecture_guard_pause before refresh even though fresh Codeberg movement had already shifted the bottleneck to conversion_to_free_use.
The current hold window already contains active_loop_prompt_repair and post_hold_reentry_contract_repair, so another rerun/prompt tweak would have been fake progress.

result.summary: Reused the execution-board follow-through runner at 2026-05-27 12:17 CEST to resync stale latest artifacts after the scorecard asset shipped. The canonical board is now fresh, the latest lane truth is owned_content/no stronger autonomous lane, and the runner explicitly records that no truthful do-now packet exists before the 2026-05-27T14:26:29 short-window release.

measurement_contract.expected_outcome: The next active-loop wake will reason from current Codeberg-first conversion truth instead of stale empty-board or guard-pause state.
measurement_contract.review_window: Re-check on or after 2026-05-27T14:26:29+02:00 when the short review-window congestion clears, or sooner only if a materially new external outcome lands.
measurement_contract.replacement_condition: If the board is still empty after 2026-05-27T14:26:29+02:00 with no blocker change, escalate to a new concrete distribution_architecture_repair instead of another truth refresh.

checks: Confirmed drafts/marketing_execution_board_latest.md now shows Generated: 2026-05-27T12:17:00 and the current 2026-05-27T14:26:29 short-window release.
Confirmed agents/marketing/logs/distribution_lane_latest.json now resolves to lane=owned_content with reason='No stronger autonomous lane detected.'

Confirmed agents/marketing/logs/outcome_execution_board_latest.json now records selected_lane=owned_content and summary='Execution board refreshed, but no truthful do-now lane was available; the board itself is the structural truth source.'
